message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-1389-replace-nats-streaming",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Replace NATS Streaming",
+    "description": "Replace NATS Streaming. Requested by 25+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nA clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]\n\nA clear and concise description of what you want to happen."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Replace NATS Streaming",
+        "description": "TLS and Encryption at rest need to be supported as well.\n\nhttps://docs.nats.io/running-a-nats-service/nats_admin/jetstream_admin/encryption_at_rest\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Replace NATS Streaming\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "TLS and Encryption at rest need to be supported as well.\n\nhttps://docs.nats.io/running-a-nats-service/nats_admin/jetstream_admin/encryption_at_rest",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
